diagrams.title: OS Position in Computer System
diagrams.description: Shows OS as intermediary between hardware and users/applications
diagrams.purpose: Understand OS role and position in system architecture

diagrams.title: OS Services Classification
diagrams.description: Categorizes OS services into User services and System services
diagrams.purpose: Visualize all OS services and their organization

diagrams.title: User Interface Types
diagrams.description: Shows three types of UI: CLI, GUI, and Batch processing
diagrams.purpose: Differentiate between UI types with visual representation
